title: selenicereus rothii
intro: Selenicereus rothii, also known as the dragon fruit cactus or night-blooming cereus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Selenicereus rothii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Selenicereus rothii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
